channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A hot summer trend in the sharing economy? Rental swimming pools
item.description: The Airbnb-style company Swimply said there have been about 275,000 private pool reservations so far this year.

item.title: But first, coffee: The drink that energized the American Revolution
item.description: Colonial Americans were drinking coffee long before they dumped tea into Boston Harbor or fought a war for independence. The establishments that serve...

item.title: Oregon ER doctors win a 'David and Goliath' battle against a national company
item.description: In a test of a new state law, doctors in Eugene went up against a national physician staffing firm seeking to replace them. Their success is getting a...

item.title: Young Americans reflect on national identity as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday
item.description: Hear top student podcasts exploring what life, liberty and happiness mean to today's youth.
